Theme Comparison

Cedar (Dark)
Zen (Light)

Ferni Brand Kit

Everything you need to represent Ferni correctly. Download logos, colors, typography, and guidelines for press, partners, and developers.

Includes all logos, icons, color specs, and guidelines as a ZIP file

Logos Avatars Colors Typography Guidelines

Logos

Primary logo marks for digital and print use. Available in SVG and multiple PNG sizes.

Primary Logo
Full color, light backgrounds
SVG PNG PNG @2x
Logo on Dark
For dark backgrounds
SVG PNG PNG @2x
Simple Logo
Flat color version
SVG PNG
Monochrome
Single color applications
SVG PNG
Ferni
Logo + Wordmark
Horizontal lockup
SVG PNG
App Icon
iOS & Android app stores
SVG iOS Android
Favicon
Browser & bookmark icons
SVG 16px 32px 192px
Ferni
Social Preview
Open Graph & Twitter cards
OG 1200x630 Twitter
Do
  • Maintain clear space equal to the eye width around the logo
  • Use on solid backgrounds or simple gradients
  • Keep eyes as opaque white (Luxo-style, no pupils)
  • Use provided color variations for different backgrounds
  • Maintain the aspect ratio when scaling
Don't
  • Never add pupils to the eyes (breaks Luxo style)
  • Stretch, distort, or rotate the orb
  • Place on busy, patterned, or photographic backgrounds
  • Add shadows, effects, or 3D treatments
  • Change the orb shape from a perfect circle

Clear Space Requirements

Minimum clear space around logo = width of one eye (X). This ensures the logo maintains visual breathing room in all contexts.

Persona Avatars

The Ferni team — 6 specialized AI companions. Each shares the Luxo-style eye design but with distinct colors.

Ferni

Coordinator

Team leader, emotional triage, handoffs

#4a6741 RGB 74, 103, 65
SVG

Maya

Habits Coach

Tiny Habits expert, behavior design

#a67a6a RGB 166, 122, 106
SVG

Peter

Money Guide

Financial wisdom, data analysis

#3a6b73 RGB 58, 107, 115
SVG

Jordan

Life Planner

Goals, milestones, celebrations

#c4856a RGB 196, 133, 106
SVG

Alex

Chief of Staff

Communication, scheduling, productivity

#5a6b8a RGB 90, 107, 138
SVG

Nayan

Wisdom Elder

Philosophy, perspective, life wisdom

#b8956a RGB 184, 149, 106
SVG

Team Portrait

SVG PNG Wide 1200x400

Accessibility Notes

Aa
Natural Ink on Warm White Contrast: 12.6:1 AAA
Aa
White on Accent Contrast: 5.8:1 AA
Aa
Warm White on Cedar Night Contrast: 14.2:1 AAA

Typography

Official typefaces for all Ferni communications. All fonts are available free from Google Fonts.

Display
Plus Jakarta Sans
Light — 300 Regular — 400 Medium — 500 SemiBold — 600 Bold — 700 ExtraBold — 800

Headlines, titles, buttons, navigation, emphasis

font-family: var(--font-display);
Download from Google Fonts
Body
Inter — The perfect body text
Light — 300 Regular — 400 Medium — 500 SemiBold — 600 Bold — 700

Body text, paragraphs, UI elements, forms, descriptions

font-family: var(--font-body);
Download from Google Fonts
Mono
JetBrains Mono
Regular — 400 Medium — 500 Bold — 700

Code, technical content, data tables, timestamps

font-family: var(--font-mono);
Download from Google Fonts

Type Scale

12px / 0.75rem XS The quick brown fox jumps over
14px / 0.875rem SM The quick brown fox jumps over
16px / 1rem Base The quick brown fox jumps over
18px / 1.125rem LG The quick brown fox jumps over
20px / 1.25rem XL The quick brown fox jumps
24px / 1.5rem 2XL The quick brown fox
30px / 1.875rem 3XL The quick brown fox
36px / 2.25rem 4XL The quick brown

Guidelines & Documentation

In-depth resources for proper brand usage and implementation.

Universe Bible

The complete Ferni story, philosophy, mission, and character backgrounds. Essential for understanding the brand.

Read Story

Expression System

100+ avatar expressions organized in 12 families. Animation principles and the Luxo-style eye documentation.

View Expressions

Data Visualization

Chart patterns, color accessibility, animation principles for presenting data in the Ferni style.

View Patterns

Motion Language

Animation timing, easing curves, and the 12 principles of Ferni motion inspired by Pixar guidelines.

Explore Motion

Design Tokens

CSS custom properties with all colors, spacing, typography, and animation values. The single source of truth.

View Tokens

Luxo-Style Eyes

The defining feature: opaque white eyes with NO pupils. Expression comes from eye SHAPE, inspired by Pixar's Luxo Jr.

Correct: Opaque white, no pupils
Ferni

Questions about brand usage? Contact brand@ferni.ai
